title: Sort cliOpts fields alphabetically in Compat Create Endpoint
body:
Improve code readability by sorting ContainerCreateOptions field assignments alphabetically and simplifying access to embedded Config fields.
Fixes: #28377

<!--

#### Checklist

Ensure you have completed the following checklist for your pull request to be reviewed:

- [x] [Documentation](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/README.md) has been updated (or no documentation changes are needed)

- [x] [Release note](https://github.com/kubernetes/community/blob/master/contributors/guide/release-notes.md) entered in the section below (or `None` if no user-facing changes)

comments.body: This work just orders the `cliOpts` fileds in [ContainerCreateOptions](https://github.com/osullivandonal/podman/blob/f15b8e1b2b12334748ab9ed4c19340831b6d4792/pkg/api/handlers/compat/containers_create.go?plain=1#L412) alphabetically. I don't think it needs tests. @mheon do we need tests for this change?

I can't tell you how much my OCD appreciates this @osullivandonal !  TYVM!
LGTM
